TELEMETRY_KEY: REPLACE_ME (shared secret — see Cloudflare Pages env vars)
_BRAND_COMMENT: Brand identity drives the cover letter signature, page header, and email templates. Default = Soprema. When onboarding Carlisle/GAF/JM/IKO/etc., swap the four BRAND_* fields below.
_BYO_KEY_COMMENT: BYO build pattern: ship config.json with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set to '' (empty string). Cipher's Settings → Anthropic API key card lets the customer paste their own key on first launch; it's stored in their userData dir. Pricing FAQ documents this as a discount path.
